Interface ILockedFeatureSearch

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to methods needed to select, search and lock MBDB records.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("6FB36881-6399-4BD6-BE3D-B07033A79114")]
public interface ILockedFeatureSearch

Properties

AllLockedFIDs

Indicates the FIDs for all locked features.

IFIDSet AllLockedFIDs { get; }

IFIDSet
